steps.title: Infer from the drone search
steps.content: Isla knew the Nazca Lines well but did not recognize the whalelike geoglyph. His decision to search a wide area by drone suggests he thought the figure might be somewhere he had not seen from the ground.

steps.title: Reject unrelated inferences
steps.content:
• Choice A concerns the species represented, not the geoglyph's location.
  • Choice B misuses the German exhibit detail; the search happens in Peru.
  • Choice D concerns when the geoglyph was created, not where to find it.

steps.title: Connect method to location
steps.content: A broad aerial search makes sense if Isla believed the geoglyph was probably in a location he had not come across on the ground. The answer is C.
